body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/budget/org-type/save 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/budget/org-type/save 
 ## 接口描述 
本接口适用于单条新增预算组织分类到智能费控
调用本接口后可在“智能费控-系统设置-预算设置-预算组织“中看到添加的预算组织分类。 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"opsEmpNumber","required":true,"label":"%E6%93%8D%E4%BD%9C%E4%BA%BA%E8%8A%B1%E5%90%8D%E5%86%8C%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"001","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetOrgTypeId","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"test0101","desc":"%20%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7%E4%BB%85%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%8150%E4%BD%8D%E4%BB%A5%E5%86%85%E6%95%B0%E5%AD%97%E5%92%8C%E5%AD%97%E6%AF%8D","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetOrgTypeName","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"api%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB","desc":"%20%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","maxLength":"150"}}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20true%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%20false%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%0D%0A%0D%0A","maxLength":"5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81","desc":"","maxLength":"500"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ### 请求报文
```json
{
  "opsEmpNumber": "001",
  "budgetOrgTypeId": "test0101",
  "budgetOrgTypeName": "api分类"
}
```
### 调用成功的响应报文
```json
{
    "success": true,
    "message": "调用成功！"
}
```
### 调用失败的响应报文，示例仅为其中一部分失败样例
```json
{
    "code": "E0002",
    "message": "预算组织分类编码只允许数字和字母;"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
sucess为导入成功状态， true为成功 其余都是失败
| 常见报错|
| --- |
| 预算组织分类编码只允许数字和字母;|
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/budget/org-type/save

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/budget/org-type/save

接口描述

本接口适用于单条新增预算组织分类到智能费控 调用本接口后可在“智能费控-系统设置-预算设置-预算组织“中看到添加的预算组织分类。

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"opsEmpNumber","required":true,"label":"%E6%93%8D%E4%BD%9C%E4%BA%BA%E8%8A%B1%E5%90%8D%E5%86%8C%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"001","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetOrgTypeId","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"test0101","desc":"%20%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7%E4%BB%85%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%8150%E4%BD%8D%E4%BB%A5%E5%86%85%E6%95%B0%E5%AD%97%E5%92%8C%E5%AD%97%E6%AF%8D","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetOrgTypeName","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"api%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB","desc":"%20%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","maxLength":"150"}}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20true%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%20false%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%0D%0A%0D%0A","maxLength":"5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81","desc":"","maxLength":"500"}}]}]}

接口调用示例

请求报文

{
  "opsEmpNumber": "001",
  "budgetOrgTypeId": "test0101",
  "budgetOrgTypeName": "api分类"
}

调用成功的响应报文

{
    "success": true,
    "message": "调用成功！"
}

调用失败的响应报文，示例仅为其中一部分失败样例

{
    "code": "E0002",
    "message": "预算组织分类编码只允许数字和字母;"
}

错误码说明

sucess为导入成功状态， true为成功 其余都是失败

常见报错
预算组织分类编码只允许数字和字母;
